title: Taylr
compiled_truth: Taylr is an external contact at [Andrews-kurth](companies/andrews-kurth). Over the corpus period (2000-06-15 to 2001-01-05), Taylr sent 5 and received 44 emails, totalling 49 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (3), [Roseann Engeldorf](people/roseann-engeldorf) (3), [Hcubill](people/hcubill) (2), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (2), [Scott Dieball](people/scott-dieball) (1).
